description: Update the personal lending log to include a calculation for the number of days each item has been on loan, identify all unreturned items, and highlight overdue entries.

natural_language.prompt: You need to clean up your personal lending tracker. Add a 'Days On Loan' column that calculates how long unreturned items have been out using TODAY() and IF/ISBLANK. Calculate the total value of unreturned items using SUMIF. Apply conditional formatting to highlight items out longer than 30 days in red.
